scripts.server: cd server && npm run build && npm run start
scripts.build: cd shared && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build && cd ../extension && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.build:extension: cd shared && npm run build && cd ../extension && npm run build
scripts.build:server: cd shared && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: cd shared && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../extension && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../server && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../client && npx tsc --noEmit
